title: Implement a plant establishment program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a plant establishment program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to establish a planting area

pcs.text: Identify the planting site, planting methods and plant species and cultivars from site plan and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the planting site, planting methods and plant species and cultivars from site plan and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the planting site, planting methods and plant species and cultivars from site plan and specifications.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery required to implement a plant establishment program and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery required to implement a plant establishment program and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery required to implement a plant establishment program and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Maintain a clean and safe work area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain a clean and safe work area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain a clean and safe work area.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to establish a planting area

elements.title: Prepare the planting area

pcs.text: Determine the layout of services against site plan and report discrepancies to supervisor and relevant authority

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the layout of services against site plan and report discrepancies to supervisor and relevant authority.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and confirm site layout and plant stock against site plan and report discrepancies.

pcs.text: Prepare planting site according to site plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare planting site according to site plan.

pcs.text: Select and apply additives as required by site conditions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and apply additives as required by site conditions.

pcs.text: Mark out the positions of plants on site

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mark out the positions of plants on site.

pcs.text: Remove and dispose of debris and pollutants from the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and dispose of debris and pollutants from the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and dispose of debris and pollutants from the site.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare the planting area

elements.title: Undertake planting operation

pcs.text: Inspect all plants for health, vigour and well-established root systems prior to being planted

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect all plants for health, vigour and well-established root systems prior to being planted.

pcs.text: Return plants with major defects to supplier or set aside to be returned

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return plants with major defects to supplier or set aside to be returned.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Trim or treat plants with minor defects to maintain health and vigour.

pcs.text: Space plants appropriately

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Space plants appropriately.

pcs.text: Use planting methods that comply with growing requirements of individual plant species and cultivars

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use planting methods that comply with growing requirements of individual plant species and cultivars.

pcs.text: Provide newly placed plants with post-planting care

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide newly placed plants with post-planting care.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prune plants, where necessary, according to needs of species and cultivar to ensure plants develop a sound framework for their growth and habit.
